description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CMake (Windows using VCPKG) that runs on every push to main and on pull requests to main, ignoring changes to markdown files, the LICENSE file, and files in the build directory. Use a matrix build job that runs on Windows 2019 and 2022, with various build types and architectures. Install Ninja, set up the VCPKG environment, configure CMake with VCPKG, and build the project.
